name: Lemon Pudding Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small heavy saucepan, combine cornstarch, water, lemon peel, and lemon juice.
2. Beat in egg.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened and clear.
4. Stir in margarine and sweetener.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
